safety_tips.tip: Removing footwear before entering temples/homes is customary

safety_tips.tip: Avoid loud conversation inside temples or wildlife parks

safety_tips.tip: Wildlife viewing should always be done silently and without flash

safety_tips.tip: Ask permission before photographing local people
